scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute nportal-db --local --file db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute nportal-db --local --file db/seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:prod: wrangler d1 execute nportal-db --remote --file db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute nportal-db --remote --file db/seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:preview: wrangler d1 execute nportal-preview-db --remote --file db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute nportal-preview-db --remote --file db/seed.sql
